ui.title: Clinic Tour
ui.lede: Get a feel for the clinic before you arrive. Use the buttons below to move from room to room.

entrance.title: Clinic Entrance
entrance.description: A warm, calm, modern reception. Our team greets you by name, confirms your appointment, and helps you complete any required forms.

waiting-area.title: Waiting Area
waiting-area.description: A quiet, family-friendly space with natural light. Tea, coffee, and free Wi-Fi are available. Wait times are kept short.

consultation-room.title: Consultation Room
consultation-room.description: A private room where Op. Dr. Kaan Işık reviews your imaging with you and walks through your treatment options in plain language.

examination-room.title: Examination Room
examination-room.description: A purpose-built room for physical examination, designed around patient privacy and comfort.

ekg-usg-room.title: ECG / Ultrasound Room
ekg-usg-room.description: A fully equipped room for ECG, echocardiography, and vascular Doppler. Most results are shared with you within the same visit.
